question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not list the main sections of the thesis. Instead, it presents a project timeline with activities and deadlines, not the structure or chapters of the thesis.

feedback: The text does not describe the contents of each section of the thesis. It outlines a timeline of activities related to the project development, not the content of the thesis sections.

question: Structure
feedback: It is not easy to understand the general structure of the thesis from this text. The text provides a project plan with deadlines, not an overview of the thesis structure or its main parts.
